testcase.name: format shows hours minutes seconds when over 1 hour
isOverLimit returns false when elapsed is under the limit
getElapsed decomposes 3661 seconds into 1 hr 1 min 1 sec
getElapsed returns null when bookedAt is in the future
format shows only seconds when under 1 minute
getElapsed decomposes 90 seconds into 1 min 30 sec
getElapsed returns zero seconds when bookedAt equals now
isOverLimit returns false when elapsed equals exactly the limit
format shows minutes and seconds when under 1 hour
isOverLimit returns true when elapsed exceeds the limit
